improvement_bullets: Developed functional and testable specifications for data surveillance controls, translating business requirements into BDD (Behavior Driven Development) test cases to streamline UAT processes.
Collaborated on feature development for internal platforms, utilizing Python-based data validation and analytical testing techniques to ensure the reliability of system outputs.
Acted as a technical liaison between business units and the development team to define end-to-end project requirements and translate complex business needs into actionable technical documentation.
Performed feasibility analysis and process design for data-heavy software projects, ensuring all system modifications align with organizational data governance and business objectives.

Authored detailed use cases and functional specifications for software development projects, facilitating seamless communication between cross-functional teams and stakeholders during the deployment lifecycle.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Technical Business Analyst opportunity with Jobs via Dice. I am interested in this opportunity because of my deep passion for bridging the gap between raw data and actionable business strategy through rigorous analytical frameworks. What interests me about working for Jobs via Dice is your reputation for facilitating high-level career connections, which inspires me because I am a firm believer in the power of data-driven professional development. I believe my background in technical requirement gathering and my proficiency in SQL and Python would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems with a focus on cross-functional alignment. In fact, at Shine Masters, I identified that manual reporting was creating data mismatches. I translated these high-level business pain points into functional requirements, architected automated Python and Power BI workflows, and managed the end-to-end implementation. This resulted in a 40% increase in work efficiency and established a single source of truth for all stakeholders, mirroring the responsibilities required for your surveillance control initiatives. Ultimately, I know that the Technical Business Analyst role at Jobs via Dice would allow me to bring my structured analysis skills to your development team. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies enabled me to develop my testing and documentation skills. I worked within an Agile squad to align features with business objectives, where I optimized complex SQL queries and documented testing data reconciliation processes to improve data accuracy by 60%. These experiences directly prepared me for authoring BDD cases and supporting UAT processes for your current projects. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in data validation and stakeholder management in working on complex technical projects at Jobs via Dice. I know that my technical fluency and commitment to requirement clarity align with what it takes to succeed at the Technical Business Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
